nodes.name: Caprese Sandwich — Maple-Kissed Variation
nodes.description: name: Caprese Sandwich — Maple-Kissed Variation | short_description: Caprese-inspired sandwich on whole-grain bread with mozzarella, tomato, basil, and balsamic; maple-kissed variation optional with a
nodes.premise: Meal: Caprese Sandwich — Maple-Kissed Variation - name: Caprese Sandwich — Maple-Kissed Variation | short_description: Caprese-inspired sandwich on whole-grain bread with mozzarella, tomato, basil, and balsamic; maple-kissed variation optional with a light maple glaze. | meal_suggestion: A quick, balanced lunch: Caprese sandwich on whole-grain bread with mozzarella, tomato, basil, and balsamic. For the maple-kissed twist, drizzle a small amount of maple-balsamic glaze. | nutrition_note: Includes fiber from whole-grain bread and protein plus calcium from mozzarella; tomatoes and basil supply vitamins and antioxidants; balsamic adds flavor with modest sugars. A maple-kissed variation can use a light maple-balsamic glaze to introduce sweetness without heavy sugar load.

nodes.name: Lentil Soup — Citrus Fresh Set
nodes.description: name: Lentil Soup — Citrus Fresh Set | short_description: A hearty, plant-based lentil soup with vegetables served alongside whole-grain bread—protein- and fiber-rich for a vegetarian lunch or dinner.
nodes.premise: Meal: Lentil Soup — Citrus Fresh Set - name: Lentil Soup — Citrus Fresh Set | short_description: A hearty, plant-based lentil soup with vegetables served alongside whole-grain bread—protein- and fiber-rich for a vegetarian lunch or dinner. | meal_suggestion: Serve hot with warm whole-grain bread; brighten with a squeeze of lemon or lemon zest to echo the Citrus Fresh theme. | nutrition_note: Plant-based protein and fiber from lentils, plus vitamins/minerals from carrots, celery, and onion. Whole-grain bread adds extra fiber and complex carbs. For lower sodium, use a low-sodium broth; a squeeze of lemon can boost citrus brightness.

nodes.name: Chicken Noodle Soup — Citrus Fresh Twist
nodes.description: name: Chicken Noodle Soup — Citrus Fresh Twist | short_description: A comforting chicken noodle soup with carrots and celery in broth, offering protein, vegetables, and warmth with a suggested citrus
nodes.premise: Meal: Chicken Noodle Soup — Citrus Fresh Twist - name: Chicken Noodle Soup — Citrus Fresh Twist | short_description: A comforting chicken noodle soup with carrots and celery in broth, offering protein, vegetables, and warmth with a suggested citrus brightness. | meal_suggestion: Finish with lemon zest or juice to emphasize the citrus twist; for more fiber, use whole-grain noodles and pair with a small fruit serving for extra vitamin C. | nutrition_note: Protein from chicken and carbohydrates from noodles provide balanced nutrition; carrots and celery add fiber and micronutrients; using a light broth helps keep fat moderate. The citrus twist is not shown in the listed ingredients, so lemon would boost vitamin C if added.
